title: dendranthema integrifolium
intro: Dendranthema integrifolium, also known as Chinese Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids. The health benefits of Dendranthema integrifolium include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as cancer and diabetes. In herbal preparations, Dendranthema integrifolium is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from fever and respiratory issues to digestive problems and skin conditions.
